title: Cut & Paste Magazine at Spotlight
excerpt: Spotlight sent me these images featuring my new Stitched collection (or "range" as they like to call it down under). I love how they turned out and am so tickled Stitched is being shared and enjoyed all the way in…
body: Spotlight sent me these images featuring my new Stitched collection (or "range" as they like to call it down under). I love how they turned out and am so tickled Stitched is being shared and enjoyed all the way in Australia and New Zealand!You can flip through the whole issue here! There's lots of eye candy and some fun projects. Hoping to make it down under sometime in 2015 as well, which is really exciting. Loved meeting some of you on my past Spotlight visits. Please feel free to link up projects in the comments using the Stitched collection. I love seeing what you're making with it on Instagram as well, using the #amytangerine and #ATstitched.
